claims.claim: Prefix-Share Serving Trace Set produced positive/supportive evidence in the recorded OMX run.

limitations: This draft is automatically generated for human review and must be checked before public release.

External replication and broader hardware/model coverage are TODO unless explicitly present in the artifacts.

Project stop/decision rationale: The native target-workflow trace rerun produced durable artifacts, changed curated-vs-control ranking, and separated observed cached-token share by 95.11 points plus modeled prefill savings by 73.51 points, meeting the stated success criterion.
forbidden_global_claims: Do not claim peer review or public validation.
